Log:
  PyDrive

  PyDrive is a wrapper library of google-api-python-client that simplifies many
  common Google Drive API tasks.

  WWW: https://github.com/googledrive/PyDrive

  PR:		216334
  Submitted by:	Paul Mather <paul@gromit.dlib.vt.edu>
